name: untitled-space
description: Y2K avant-garde sci-fi personal blog built with Astro

default.instructions: Follow AGENTS.md strictly. All CSS must be hand-written. No Tailwind. Design aesthetic: Y2K retro sci-fi, dotted borders, blue-green palette, monospace, CRT scanlines, ASCII-art decorations.

retro-theming.description: Creates CSS components matching the Y2K retro aesthetic
instructions: Use monospace font stack: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace
Apply scanline overlay on images if applicable
Use flat colors from the blue-green palette
ASCII-art decorations for dividers and section breaks

content-creation.description: Creates blog posts and notes content
instructions: Use frontmatter: title, date, tags, description
Deployment: push to main triggers GitHub Actions
